channel.title: openEuler — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by openEuler (openeuler).

item.title: CVE-2025-31344 · 7.3 HIGH — The giflib open-source component has a buffer overflow vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in openEuler giflib on Linux. This vulnerability is associated with program files gif2rgb.C. This issue affects giflib: through 5.2.2.

item.title: CVE-2024-24898 · 6 MEDIUM — Information Leakage in kernel
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in openEuler kernel on Linux allows Resource Leak Exposure. This vulnerability is associated with program files https://gitee.Com/openeuler/kernel/blob/openEuler-1.0-LTS/drivers…

item.title: CVE-2024-24891 · 6 MEDIUM — Information Leakage in kernel
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in openEuler kernel on Linux allows Resource Leak Exposure. This vulnerability is associated with program files https://gitee.Com/openeuler/kernel/blob/openEuler-1.0-LTS/drivers…

item.title: CVE-2024-24892 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthorized RCE in migration-tools
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection'), Improper Privilege Management vulnerability in openEuler migration-tools on Linux allows Command Injection, Restful Privilege Elevation. This vulnerability is…

item.title: CVE-2024-24899 · 7.2 HIGH — Command injection in aops-zeus
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability in openEuler aops-zeus on Linux allows Command Injection. This vulnerability is associated with program files https://gitee.Com/openeuler/aops-ze…

item.title: CVE-2024-24897 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Remote command execution in A-Tune-Collector
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection') vulnerability in openEuler A-Tune-Collector on Linux allows Command Injection. This vulnerability is associated with program files https://gitee.Com/openeuler/A-Tune-…

item.title: CVE-2024-24890 · 7.8 HIGH — Command injection in ioprobe of gala-gopher
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability in openEuler gala-gopher on Linux allows Command Injection. This vulnerability is associated with program files https://gitee.Com/openeuler/gala-…

item.title: CVE-2021-33632 · 7 HIGH — TOCTOU Race Condition problem in iSulad
item.description: Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition vulnerability in openEuler iSulad on Linux allows Leveraging Time-of-Check and Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) Race Conditions. This vulnerability is associated with program files https://gitee.Com/openeuler/iSu…

item.title: CVE-2021-33633 · 7.3 HIGH — Command Injection in aops-ceres
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') vulnerability in openEuler aops-ceres on Linux allows Command Injection. This vulnerability is associated with program files ceres/function/util.Py. This issue…

item.title: CVE-2021-33631 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Kernel crash in EXT4 filesystem
item.description: Integer Overflow or Wraparound vulnerability in openEuler kernel on Linux (filesystem modules) allows Forced Integer Overflow.This issue affects openEuler kernel: from 4.19.90 before 4.19.90-2401.3, from 5.10.0-60.18.0 before 5.10.0-183.0.0.

item.title: CVE-2021-33630 · 5.5 MEDIUM — NULL-ptr-deref in network sched
item.description: NULL Pointer Dereference vulnerability in openEuler kernel on Linux (network modules) allows Pointer Manipulation. This vulnerability is associated with program files net/sched/sch_cbs.C. This issue affects openEuler kernel: from 4.19.90 before 4.19.…

item.title: CVE-2021-33638 · 8.4 HIGH — Run copy with container in a malicious directory may cause container escaping
item.description: When the isula cp command is used to copy files from a container to a host machine and the container is controlled by an attacker, the attacker can escape the container.

item.title: CVE-2021-33637 · 8.4 HIGH — Export container in a malicious directory may cause process to be hijacked
item.description: When the isula export command is used to export a container to an image and the container is controlled by an attacker, the attacker can escape the container.

item.title: CVE-2021-33636 · 8.4 HIGH — Load malicious images may cause process to be hijacked
item.description: When the isula load command is used to load malicious images, attackers can execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2021-33635 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Pull malicious images may cause process to be hijacked
item.description: When malicious images are pulled by isula pull, attackers can execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2021-33634 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Malicious image running containers may cause DoS attacks
item.description: iSulad uses the lcr+lxc runtime (default) to run malicious images, which can cause DOS.

item.title: CVE-2021-33639 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: REMAP cmd of SVM driver can be used to remap read only memory as read-write, then cause read only memory/file modified.

item.title: CVE-2021-33642 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: When a file is processed, an infinite loop occurs in next_inline() of the more_curly() function.

item.title: CVE-2021-33641 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: When processing files, malloc stores the data of the current line. When processing comments, malloc incorrectly accesses the released memory (use after free).

item.title: CVE-2021-33640 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: After tar_close(), libtar.c releases the memory pointed to by pointer t. After tar_close() is called in the list() function, it continues to use pointer t: free_longlink_longname(t->th_buf) . As a result, the released memory is used (use-after-free).

item.title: CVE-2021-33646
item.description: The th_read() function doesn’t free a variable t->th_buf.gnu_longname after allocating memory, which may cause a memory leak.

item.title: CVE-2021-33645
item.description: The th_read() function doesn’t free a variable t->th_buf.gnu_longlink after allocating memory, which may cause a memory leak.

item.title: CVE-2021-33644
item.description: An attacker who submits a crafted tar file with size in header struct being 0 may be able to trigger an calling of malloc(0) for a variable gnu_longname, causing an out-of-bounds read.

item.title: CVE-2021-33643
item.description: An attacker who submits a crafted tar file with size in header struct being 0 may be able to trigger an calling of malloc(0) for a variable gnu_longlink, causing an out-of-bounds read.

item.title: CVE-2021-33655
item.description: When sending malicous data to kernel by ioctl cmd FBIOPUT_VSCREENINFO,kernel will write memory out of bounds.

item.title: CVE-2021-33656
item.description: When setting font with malicous data by ioctl cmd PIO_FONT,kernel will write memory out of bounds.

item.title: CVE-2021-33654
item.description: When performing the initialization operation of the Split operator, if a dimension in the input shape is 0, it will cause a division by 0 exception.

item.title: CVE-2021-33653
item.description: When performing the derivation shape operation of the SpaceToBatch operator, if there is a value of 0 in the parameter block_shape element, it will cause a division by 0 exception.

item.title: CVE-2021-33650
item.description: When performing the inference shape operation of the SparseToDense operator, if the number of inputs is less than three, it will access data outside of bounds of inputs which allocated from heap buffers.

item.title: CVE-2021-33651
item.description: When performing the analytical operation of the DepthwiseConv2D operator, if the attribute depth_multiplier is 0, it will cause a division by 0 exception.

item.title: CVE-2021-33652
item.description: When the Reduce operator run operation is executed, if there is a value of 0 in the parameter axis_sizes element, it will cause a division by 0 exception.

item.title: CVE-2021-33649
item.description: When performing the inference shape operation of the Transpose operator, if the value in the perm element is greater than or equal to the size of the input_shape, it will access data outside of bounds of input_shape which allocated from heap buffers.

item.title: CVE-2021-33647
item.description: When performing the inference shape operation of the Tile operator, if the input data type is not int or int32, it will access data outside of bounds of heap allocated buffers.

item.title: CVE-2021-33648
item.description: When performing the inference shape operation of Affine, Concat, MatMul, ArgMinMax, EmbeddingLookup, and Gather operators, if the input shape size is 0, it will access data outside of bounds of shape which allocated from heap buffers.

item.title: CVE-2021-33657
item.description: There is a heap overflow problem in video/SDL_pixels.c in SDL (Simple DirectMedia Layer) 2.x to 2.0.18 versions. By crafting a malicious .BMP file, an attacker can cause the application using this library to crash, denial of service or Code execution…

item.title: CVE-2021-33658
item.description: atune before 0.3-0.8 log in as a local user and run the curl command to access the local atune url interface to escalate the local privilege or modify any file. Authentication is not forcibly enabled in the default configuration.

item.title: CVE-2021-33629
item.description: isula-build before 0.9.5-6 can cause a program crash, when building container images, some functions for processing external data do not remove spaces when processing data.

item.title: CVE-2020-15437
item.description: The Linux kernel before version 5.8 is vulnerable to a NULL pointer dereference in drivers/tty/serial/8250/8250_core.c:serial8250_isa_init_ports() that allows local users to cause a denial of service by using the p->serial_in pointer which uninitiali…

item.title: CVE-2020-15436
item.description: Use-after-free vulnerability in fs/block_dev.c in the Linux kernel before 5.8 allows local users to gain privileges or cause a denial of service by leveraging improper access to a certain error field.
